images.title: Remiremont et Saint-Étienne - ruisseau du Fouchot - 2022-05-03 - 01 02.jpg
images.description: Ruisseau du Fouchot at the city boundary of Remiremont and Saint-Étienne-lès-Remiremont in Vosges, France, a few dozen meters before it crosses the Canal d'Alimentation du Réservoir de Bouzey. View from upstream towards the north.

images.title: Remiremont et Saint-Étienne - ruisseau du Fouchot - 2022-05-03 - 01 01.jpg
images.description: Sign on the bank of Ruisseau du Fouchot at the city boundary of Remiremont and Saint-Étienne-lès-Remiremont in Vosges, France, a few dozen meters before it crosses the Canal d'Alimentation du Réservoir de Bouzey. The sign is on the side of Saint-Étienne-lès-Remiremont.
